summary: Iter-10 verification: 4 new features tested end-to-end. All 7 review items pass. 20 new pytest cases (iteration10) + 38 prior iter-7/8/9 tests all green. Playwright pass on (a) admin login -> All providers tab -> edit dialog -> save (toast 'Therapist updated' shown, dialog closed, 106 rows visible) and (b) patient results page consult-btn-0 mailto: href verified with subject 'Free 15-min consult — TheraVoca match', body 'Hi Sean,...', presenting_issues 'anxiety and depression' pre-filled.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}' on the edit-provider-dialog. Cosmetic a11y warning only — add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to silence.

action_items: (Low priority) Add <DialogDescription> to edit-provider-dialog to silence Radix a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: matching.py: theoretical max breakdown sum = 103 (35+20+15+10+10+5+3+2+3). The clamp `min(100.0, sum(...))` is correct — verified by test_total_capped_at_100.
server.py PUT /api/admin/therapists/{id}: whitelist-based update is the right pattern; 400 on empty/invalid payload, 404 on unknown id — verified.

email_service._send: EMAIL_OVERRIDE_TO is read on every call (good — supports hot env reload). Subject prefix uses the original `to`, which leaks the patient address into the dev inbox subject line; acceptable for dev-only override but make sure EMAIL_OVERRIDE_TO is unset in production deployments.
matching._insurance_match: cleanly handles 'other' and 'Other / not listed' (lower-cased + stripped). No regression on Aetna/Cigna case. Looks good.

PatientResults.jsx buildConsultMailto: uses URLSearchParams which encodes spaces as '+' — most mail clients accept this for mailto bodies, but RFC 6068 prefers %20. Currently functional in Gmail/Apple Mail; consider replacing '+' with '%20' if a client renders literal '+' chars.
test_credentials: Admin: admin123! ; existing test request 34e1cf56-59bd-4b41-9eff-846e9375c383 with Sean Rivera, LCSW application.
seed_data_creation: Mutated first therapist (5ab93732...) bio + cash_rate via PUT — leaves id intact, only overwrites whitelisted fields. No new collections created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter10 covers: payment_fit axis, 9-key breakdown, 'Other / not listed' insurance skip, admin PUT /admin/therapists/{id} whitelist, EMAIL_OVERRIDE_TO redirect (mocked resend.Emails.send via monkeypatch), consult-btn mailto. All admin endpoints require X-Admin-Password header. The Playwright tests for admin All Providers tab should keep using data-testid='tab-all-therapists', 'all-therapists-table', 'provider-row-{id}', 'edit-provider-{id}', 'edit-provider-dialog', 'edit-bio', 'edit-sliding-scale', 'edit-save'. Consult button: 'consult-btn-{i}' on each result-card-{i}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter-10 features.
